# agent

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Renders Agent tool calls with subagent type, model badge, prompt (markdown), and report (markdown).
- Web:
  - Contributes: `JsonlViewerTool.Renderer` "Agent" → `AgentToolView`, `Pane.Register` "agent-report"
  - Uses: `conversations/conversation-view.conversationPane`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call.JsonlViewerTool`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/tool-call.ToolCallCard`, `conversations/model-provider.familyClass`, `primitives/css/badge.Badge`, `primitives/css/row.Row`, `primitives/css/scroll.Scroll`, `primitives/css/spacing.Inset`, `primitives/css/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/css/text.Text`, `primitives/icon-button.IconButton`, `primitives/live-state.useResource`, `primitives/loading.Loading`, `primitives/markdown.Markdown`, `primitives/pane.Pane`, `primitives/pane.PaneChrome`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
